title: keteleeria davidiana
intro: Keteleeria davidiana, also known as Chinese fir, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Keteleeria davidiana include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
